top_signals.title: Wunsch Says ECB's Case for Other Hike Not as Strong Now
top_signals.summary: European Central Bank Governing Council member Pierre Wunsch says a further interest-rate hike isn’t as clear as it was after the June meeting. “We might need another hike — that’s, of course, what the market is pricing — but not as much as we thought in June,” he says in an interview with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua at the ECB Forum on Central Banking in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Is the tide turning against Russia in Ukraine?
top_signals.summary: There is no guarantee that Putin will seek a negotiated freeze in the Ukraine conflict, not least because he might not grasp the situation Russia is in.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Philippines approves Metro Manila's biggest minimum wage hike in decades
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: New rules to protect EU steel industry from damaging impacts of global overcapacity enter into application
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 30 Jun 2026 A new regulation that protects the EU steel sector from the damaging impacts of global overcapacity enters into application on 1 July 2026. This represents a vital step towards ensuring the long-term viability of a strategically crucial European industry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Questions and answers on implementing the EU's Steel Regulation: the tariff quota distribution for steel imports
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Questions and answers Brussels, 30 Jun 2026 What quotas have been put in place on steel imports into the EU and whom do they concern?
The EU's steel measure, which enters into application on 1 July 2026, ...
